title: remove()
text: remove() Delete the DSP view object. unifaceViewObject . remove() Return Value None Description After calling this function, the View object is invalid, and any attempt to call its member functions will throw the following exception: uniface.InvalidDataObjectException . Note: This function does not work with the default view that is automatically created by the weblayout ProcScript command. Related Links uniface.InvalidDataObjectException Exception thrown if the object on which the function is called is no longer valid. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
